bonusTasks.title: Razorpay's North Star Metric — Beyond GMV
bonusTasks.summary: Razorpay tracks payment success rate as their true north star — not GMV, not transactions. One metric that aligns engineering, product, and business.
keyTakeaways: A north star metric should reflect value delivered to users, not just business outcomes
Payment success rate captures reliability — Razorpay's core promise
Counter-metrics prevent gaming: high success rate AND low fraud
